name: lexwiki
description: LLM-powered legal knowledge base. Ingest contracts, statutes, and case law into a structured Obsidian wiki with backlinks, clause libraries, and self-healing linting.
long_description: LexWiki compiles raw legal documents (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, HTML, TXT) into a structured, interlinked Obsidian wiki. The LLM classifies documents, generates summaries with key terms and obligations, builds cross-document indexes (clause libraries, precedent maps, jurisdiction trackers), and maintains consistency through automated linting. No vector database required — the LLM navigates its own markdown indexes. Inspired by Karpathy's LLM Knowledge Bases pattern, built for legal.

tools.name: lexwiki_ingest
tools.description: Ingest a legal document (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, HTML, TXT) into the knowledge base. Extracts text to markdown with metadata.

tools.name: lexwiki_compile
tools.description: Compile raw documents into a structured wiki with backlinks, clause libraries, jurisdiction trackers, and indexes.

tools.name: lexwiki_query
tools.description: Query the legal knowledge base using natural language. Returns answers with [[wiki page]] citations.

tools.name: lexwiki_lint
tools.description: Check for expired statute citations, inconsistent clauses across contracts, missing standard terms, and broken backlinks.

tools.name: lexwiki_read_page
tools.description: Read the full content of a specific wiki page by name.

tools.name: lexwiki_list_pages
tools.description: List all pages in the wiki, optionally filtered by category (contracts, statutes, cases, memos, topics, indexes).

tools.name: lexwiki_search
tools.description: Fast keyword search across wiki pages (BM25 ranking, no LLM call needed). Use for quick lookups before resorting to lexwiki_query.

api_key.title: LLM API Key
api_key.description: Your API key for OpenRouter, Anthropic, or OpenAI. Auto-detects provider from key format.

vault_directory.title: Vault Directory
vault_directory.description: Where to store your legal knowledge base (raw documents and compiled wiki).

llm_provider.title: LLM Provider
llm_provider.description: LLM provider: openrouter, anthropic, openai, or ollama. Leave empty to auto-detect from API key.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model name (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514 for OpenRouter, claude-sonnet-4-20250514 for Anthropic direct).
